title: Quantitative Research Methods for Environmental Earth Sciences

prerequisites.text: EGS3012S or equivalent; OR at least one of a first-year Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, Physics or Computer Science course; OR at the discretion of the HOD.

outline: The course has a dual purpose. Firstly, a series of weekly lectures and hands-on practical seminars covering the nuts and bolts of quantitative analysis, including fundamental methods commonly found in the literature: classification, time series analysis, EOF/PCA and non-linear analysis. In parallel, a series of seminars on the Philosophy of Science addresses issues of values, perception and the science community.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance record and submission of all assignments.
